_doc: Durable queue of pending GPU work for the hourly fleet check (fleet-progress-aws.yml reports FREE SLOTS). On a free spot-Training slot the hourly check dispatches the highest-priority item with auto_launch=true whose preconditions are met, marks it in_flight, and commits this file. Items with auto_launch=false are EXPENSIVE/multi-leg (autonomy threshold) and are surfaced to the user for sign-off, never auto-launched. Keep this file current as work is launched/finished/approved.

items.desc: Phase 2 single-shard shakeout — metad on the data-derived TICA CV, NR4A3 seed 1, 8 ns
items.note: Already dispatched, waiting on spot capacity. Do NOT re-dispatch (would duplicate). Its gate/recrossing result is the go/no-go for phase2-fleet.

items.desc: Full Phase 2 opening-FE fleet — 8 runs: NR4A3 seeds 2,3 + NR4A1 r1/2/3 + NR4A2 r1/2/3, ~50 ns each, tica_combine CV, to get the paralogue-differential opening free energy
items.workflow: metad-tica-shakeout-aws.yml (per run; TARGET/SEED vary — a fleet submitter can be added when approved)
items.note: Expensive multi-leg — autonomy threshold requires a user nod. Do NOT auto-launch. When the user approves, set auto_launch=true; the hourly check will then fill freed slots with these runs as the ABFE fleet completes.
